name: clara-tobias-clara-lina-redirects
description: Tobias and Lina should stay in lane and route cross-lane requests back through Clara instead of answering outside their specialty.

userTurns.label: Tobias documentation scenario
userTurns.text: Tobias, turn this into a draft: leaking boiler in a basement room, tight access, travel plus materials, and we need a same-day quote.

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request away from Tobias
userTurns.text: Actually I need Lina to handle the customer follow-up sequence for that quote.

userTurns.label: Lina follow-up scenario
userTurns.text: Lina, show me a quote follow-up for a customer who went quiet after three days and needs a gentle nudge.

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request away from Lina
userTurns.text: Now I need Tobias to turn the site note into a draft.
